items.title: The LA Clippers are 1-1 in Summer League
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The LA Clippers are 1-1 in Summer League

Final score: Clippers 104, Jazz 82

Nick Martinelli: 14 points, 7/11 FGs, 6 rebounds, 1 steal

FGs: LAC 35/81, 43.%; UTA 27/63, 42.9%

Big possession battle game for Clippers: 15-8 offensive rebound advantage, 14-11 opp. turnover advantage

items.title: (no text)
items.author: Hoop Informatics

items.title: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.

items.title: Keaton Wagler’s night is done after a 23-point performance, with 18 coming in the third quarter. Wagler, who played 28 minutes, finishes with 4 assists, as well. The No. 5 overall selection was 6-for-16 from the field but went 4-for-7 on 3s. A very good display of aggression.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler’s night is done after a 23-point performance, with 18 coming in the third quarter. Wagler, who played 28 minutes, finishes with 4 assists, as well. The No. 5 overall selection was 6-for-16 from the field but went 4-for-7 on 3s. A very good display of aggression.

items.title: Keaton Wagler: 18 of his game-high 23 points in third quarter
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Keaton Wagler: 18 of his game-high 23 points in third quarter

Clippers lead 82-56 through three quarters

items.title: Clippers lead Jazz 82-56 after three. Keaton Wagler has 23 points for the game, with 18 coming in the third quarter alone. Wagler was 5-for-8 in the third with 3 made 3s. That was some kind of show from Wagler in the frame, and the Clippers have blown this one wide open.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers lead Jazz 82-56 after three. Keaton Wagler has 23 points for the game, with 18 coming in the third quarter alone. Wagler was 5-for-8 in the third with 3 made 3s. That was some kind of show from Wagler in the frame, and the Clippers have blown this one wide open.

items.title: My @orlandosentinel.com recap as the #Magic storm back, capture a Summer League win in OT against the Trail Blazers:
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My @orlandosentinel.com recap as the #Magic storm back, capture a Summer League win in OT against the Trail Blazers:

“Everybody stayed ready,” Orlando’s DJ Bakker said after the win. “When you talk about being a connected team, that’s what it looks like.” www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/12/o...

media.title: Magic storm back, capture Summer League win in OT against Trail Blazers
media.description: The Magic were without Jase Richardson and Noah Penda in the second Summer League game of a back-to-back Sunday against the Trail Blazers.

items.title: Keaton Wagler got hit in the face and Nick Martinelli started to walk over towards the Utah bench as if he was going to fight on Wagler’s behalf. The play is under review for a possible flagrant foul. Clippers lead 65-54.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler got hit in the face and Nick Martinelli started to walk over towards the Utah bench as if he was going to fight on Wagler’s behalf. The play is under review for a possible flagrant foul. Clippers lead 65-54.

items.title: Keaton Wagler’s second 3-pointer of the night has pulled the Clippers into a 53-44 lead. Wagler has 10 points and 3 assists in 17 minutes. The aggression has been there, even if the shotmaking, in large quantities, has not.
